hero.description: MeetOnMemory is an AI-powered platform that transforms meeting recordings and transcripts into searchable, structured knowledge. Preserve institutional memory and make every conversation count.

features.subtitle: Everything you need to capture, organize, and retrieve institutional knowledge — all in one place.
features.aiMeetingSummariesDesc: Automatically generate intelligent meeting summaries and Minutes of Meeting (MoM) using advanced AI.
features.smartSearchDesc: Perform semantic search across all meeting records and documents using vector embeddings and AI.
features.meetingRecordingDesc: Upload meeting recordings or transcripts for AI-powered processing and storage.
features.reportsAnalyticsDesc: Generate insightful reports and visualize meeting activity and organizational trends.
features.policyManagementDesc: Store, organize, version, and search organizational policies in one centralized location.
features.institutionalMemoryDesc: Preserve valuable organizational knowledge so information remains accessible even when team members change.

about.description: MeetOnMemory is an AI-powered knowledge management platform that transforms meetings into searchable, structured knowledge. Instead of losing valuable discussions, teams can instantly access summaries, action items, and key decisions whenever they need them.
about.aiMeetingIntelligenceDesc: Automatically transcribe meetings, generate summaries, and capture action items.
about.semanticSearchDesc: Quickly find discussions, decisions, and information from past meetings.
about.smartReportsDesc: Generate AI-powered reports and insights to support better decisions.
about.teamCollaborationDesc: Collaborate with your organization in one centralized knowledge hub.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about MeetOnMemory, AI-powered meeting intelligence, collaboration, and knowledge management.
faq.a1: MeetOnMemory is currently under active development. During this phase, core features are available for testing. Pricing plans will be introduced as the platform matures.
faq.a2: MeetOnMemory leverages modern AI models such as Google Gemini for meeting summarization and knowledge extraction. Additional AI services may be integrated as the platform evolves.
faq.a3: Yes, you can upload meeting recordings, transcripts, and supporting documents. The platform processes them to generate summaries, extract key decisions, and build searchable organizational knowledge.
faq.a4: Security is a priority. Authentication, protected APIs, and organization-based access controls help ensure your meeting data remains private and accessible only to authorized users.
faq.a5: Absolutely. MeetOnMemory uses AI-powered semantic search so you can ask natural language questions and quickly retrieve discussions, action items, and past decisions.
faq.a6: The platform is designed to support meeting recordings, transcripts, PDFs, and other commonly used meeting documents. Additional formats may be added over time.
faq.a7: Yes. Organizations can collaborate in shared workspaces where members can access meetings, documents, AI summaries, and organizational knowledge together.
faq.a8: Yes. AI-generated reports include meeting summaries, key decisions, action items, analytics, and structured Minutes of Meeting (MoM) to improve productivity.
faq.trySelf: Try MeetOnMemory yourself — no credit card required.

howItWorks.howWorksDesc: Transform meeting voice and transcripts into searchable structured knowledge. Learn how we capture and preserve your organization's memory in 5 steps.
howItWorks.welcomeOrg: Welcome to your organization dashboard for
howItWorks.uploadDesc: Drag and drop audio/video file here, or click to browse
howItWorks.typeQuery: Type query above to scan workspace meetings...
howItWorks.step1Desc: Allow users to create or join an organization to centralize meetings, documents, and team collaboration.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Upload meeting recordings, transcripts, or notes for AI-powered processing and storage.
howItWorks.step3Desc: AI automatically transcribes, summarizes, extracts key insights, and organizes meeting content into structured knowledge.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Use semantic search to instantly find meeting discussions, policies, action items, or organizational decisions.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Generate AI-powered reports, summaries, analytics, and insights for better decision-making and long-term knowledge management.

footer.description: AI-powered meeting intelligence and organizational knowledge management platform.

dashboard.everythingHere: . Everything you need is right here.
dashboard.searchDescription: Instantly find insights across your meetings, summaries, and policies — powered by AI.
dashboard.everythingInOnePlace: Everything you need, in one place
dashboard.uploadMeetingsDesc: Upload and transcribe past meetings automatically using AI-powered speech-to-text.
dashboard.meetingEventHubDesc: Schedule, upload, and organise events or sessions for instant AI-driven summaries.
dashboard.aiSummarizationDesc: Generate professional Minutes of Meeting with decisions, action points, and key insights.
dashboard.policiesRepositoryDesc: Upload, version, and audit organisational policies with AI-powered insights and search.
dashboard.reportsAnalyticsDesc: Visualise organisational metrics — meetings, updates, and performance trends at a glance.
